data.content: Plan recorded for a narrow workflow-only fix. Update `.github/workflows/release.yml` by bumping `actions/download-artifact` to a Node 24-compatible major and replacing `softprops/action-gh-release@v2` with an equivalent `gh release create` publish step unless a smaller upstream Node 24-safe bump is available at implementation time. Validate with `actionlint`, upstream action runtime checks, and `make sanity`. No child knots were created.
